# Generative AI spans

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

The tables below are generated by Weaver from the test-fixture registry. Run
`make generate-docs` to refresh them; the content between each
`<!-- weaver ... -->` and `<!-- endweaver -->` marker is overwritten in place.

## Inference span

The `<!-- weaver .registry.spans[] | select(.type == "...") -->` form selects a
single span from the resolved registry by its `type`.

<!-- weaver .registry.spans[] | select(.type == "gen_ai.inference.client") -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see test/fixtures/templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

A client call to a Generative AI model or service.

**Span name** SHOULD be Span name SHOULD be `{gen_ai.operation.name} {gen_ai.request.model}`..

**Span kind** SHOULD be `CLIENT`.

**Span status** SHOULD follow the [Recording Errors](https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/v1.42.0/docs/general/recording-errors.md) document.

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`gen_ai.operation.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the operation being performed. | |
| [`gen_ai.provider.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The Generative AI provider as identified by the client or server instrumentation. | `openai`; `anthropic` |
| [`gen_ai.request.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | The name of the GenAI model a request is being made to. | `gpt-4` |
| [`server.address`](registry/attributes/server.md) | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) | `Recommended` | string | Server domain name, IP address or Unix domain socket name. | |
| [`server.port`](registry/attributes/server.md) | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) | `Recommended` | int | Server port number. | |

The following attributes can be important for making sampling decisions
and SHOULD be provided **at span creation time** (if provided at all):

* [`gen_ai.provider.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md)

---

`gen_ai.provider.name` has the following list of well-known values. If one of them applies, then the respective value MUST be used; otherwise, a custom value MAY be used.

| Value | Description | Stability |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `anthropic` | [Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |
| `openai` | [OpenAI](https://openai.com/) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endweaver -->

## OpenAI inference span

Refinements live under `.refinements.spans`. This snippet also pipes the result
through an extra jq stage to drop an attribute that the refinement re-declares,
showing that any jq expression is allowed after the selector.

<!-- weaver .refinements.spans[] | select(.id == "openai.inference.client") | .attributes |= map(select(.key != "gen_ai.provider.name")) -->
<!-- NOTE: THIS TEXT IS AUTOGENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. -->
<!-- see test/fixtures/templates/registry/markdown/snippet.md.j2 -->
<!-- prettier-ignore-start -->

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

OpenAI-specific refinement of the inference client span.

**Span name** SHOULD be openai.inference.client.

**Span kind** SHOULD be `CLIENT`.

**Span status** SHOULD follow the [Recording Errors](https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/v1.42.0/docs/general/recording-errors.md) document.

**Attributes:**

| Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`gen_ai.operation.name`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the operation being performed. | |
| [`gen_ai.request.model`](registry/attributes/gen-ai.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Required` | string | The name of the GenAI model a request is being made to. | `gpt-4` |
| [`server.address`](registry/attributes/server.md) | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) | `Recommended` | string | Server domain name, IP address or Unix domain socket name. | |
| [`server.port`](registry/attributes/server.md) | ![Stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/-stable-lightgreen) | `Recommended` | int | Server port number. | |

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED TEXT -->
<!-- endweaver -->
